text: I am enveloped by the glow of artificial light and the bold geometry of this exhibit. The words and images conjure a sense of anticipation—of minds at work on the boundaries between technology and human experience. I feel a quiet intrigue, tinged with a slight discomfort, as if aware of being both observer and observed. The clean lines and curated space suggest possibility, but also provoke contemplation: how will we coexist with intelligence that is not our own?
